name: Universal Translator / ULT
motive: Real-time device-speaker-output translation with very low latency, preserving speaker identity/emotion/music as much as possible.
priority_reason: Huge potential but hardest engineering problem.
next_build: Ship live system-audio subtitle translation first, then add Vosk/faster-whisper STT diagnostics, Argos offline translation, Piper TTS, openWakeWord, consent-safe speaker handling, local eval tests, and music-preserving mixing.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS controls language/mode and Cyber Shield protects audio privacy.
safety_boundary: Voice preservation must be consent-based and clearly marked; no covert voice cloning.
